productDisplayName: Yelloe Off White Fur Zip Clutch
description: A perfect option to go with your fashionable outfits, this off white clutch from yelloe comes with a glossy upper and a spacious inner to hold your party essentials.Dimensions : 12 cm x 23 cmMade of leatherette and furHas a zipped closure with a fur runner on the zip for styleOne zipped inner pocketQuilted design on the outside with an overlayBranding appliquéd on the frontCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
